## 🔗 Related Issue
Resolves #

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking Change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update
- [ ] ⚙️ Infrastructure/Template Update (Docker, Terraform, CI/CD)

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] Local Unit Tests passed
- [ ] UI/Dashboard renders correctly (if applicable)
- [ ] Solver/Container deployment tested successfully
- [ ] Other (please specify):

## ✅ DevOps & Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (e.g., complex solver logic or AI Agent prompts).
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (`/docs`).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or linter errors.
